testcase.name: test_email_register_or_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tycoon_backend.py:61: in test_email_register_or_login assert r.status_code == 200, f"{r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: 422 {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"tester@tycoon.test","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_email_login_explicit
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tycoon_backend.py:74: in test_email_login_explicit assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"tester@tycoon.test","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert 422 == 200 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_email_login_wrong_password
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tycoon_backend.py:83: in test_email_login_wrong_password assert r.status_code == 401 E assert 422 == 401 E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
